_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: anti-HA immunofluorescent staining showed increased localization of GRDC24 in the plasma membrane (white arrow heads), in comparison to the diffused expression pattern of GRD alone
details: Successfully detected membrane localization of GRDC24 in immunofluorescent staining, showing increased plasma membrane localization compared to GRD alone
